definitions: To identify someone by their name after recognizing their appearance.
To recall or learn the name of a person whose face is familiar.
examples: I recognize her, but I can't put a name on a face.
It took me a moment to put a name on a face, but then I remembered he was John.
She's good at putting names on faces at networking events.
lemma: put a name on a face
synonyms: place a name with a face
source: put a name on a face
